summary.en: NovoPen reframed insulin delivery from a clinical syringe ritual into a portable pen-like self-injection system, lowering psychological and practical barriers for people with diabetes.
summary.zh: NovoPen 把胰岛素注射从临床化的针筒仪式，重构为便携、笔式、自我注射系统，降低糖尿病患者的心理和操作门槛。
